candidate.description: Classic asynchronous consensus protocol with proposers, acceptors, and learners; tolerates F failures with 2F+1 acceptors.

candidates_full.full_description: Lamport's consensus protocol: prepare/promise then accept/accepted phases over a quorum of acceptors; foundation of multi-Paxos and variants like Raft.
Understandable consensus algorithm with explicit leader election and log replication; equivalent in power to Paxos.
